title: NTR Sharehouse ~My Girlfriend, My Best Friend and Some Guy
description: In high school, Yoichi had it all. He was the coolest guy in school, with a loving girlfriend and a cute childhood friend that would do anything for him, so when they told him they were going to live in a share house in Tokyo for college, he wasn't worried in the least. Little did he know that the random guy that's their new housemate has a hypnotizing way with women... and a huge dick!
author: J no Kakusei
